LearnerDefaultText:
I confirm that I have completed the required pathway and achieved the necessary {{CompetencyAssessmentName}}. I understand that:

  • I am responsible and accountable for my practice
  • my skills and achievements are recorded for future reference
  • if I move to a new role or area, I may need to review or expand my skills
  • I must follow organisational policies and guidance
  • I should speak to a senior colleague if I am unsure about any aspect of my practice,

my {{CompetencyAssessmentName}} will be reviewed as part of personal development and revalidation
SupervisorDefaultText:
I confirm that the individual:

  • has completed all required learning and assessments
  • is safe and proficient in the skills recorded
  • has been assessed by a competent and authorised assessor

{{CompetencyAssessmentName}} will be reviewed as part of personal development and revalidation.
